channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇹🇷📈 Turkish Inflation Surges to 4.18% Monthly as Iran War Fallout Hits Economy
item.description: Turkish monthly inflation jumped to 4.18% in April with annual inflation at 32.37%, exceeding forecasts as the Iran conflict tests the central banks policy stance. [Economy, Reuters]

item.title: 🇺🇸💨 Trump Administration Halts US Wind Farm Projects Citing National Security
item.description: The Trump administration has brought U.S. onshore wind development to a halt, citing national security concerns, the Financial Times reported. [Energy, Reuters]

item.title: 🚢⚠️ US-Led Task Force Begins Effort to Reopen Strait of Hormuz, Ships Told to Reroute
item.description: The US launched an effort to guide stranded ships through the Iran-controlled Strait of Hormuz on Monday, as Iran warned against any interference in the waterway. [Middle East, AP News]

item.title: 🇺🇸🇲🇦 Two US Troops Missing During African Lion Military Exercise in Morocco
item.description: Two US service members participating in joint military exercises were reported missing near Tan Tan in southern Morocco, AFRICOM and Moroccan forces announced. [Military, Reuters]

item.title: 🤖💰 AI Chipmaker Cerebras Targets $115-$125 Share Price in US IPO
item.description: AI chipmaker Cerebras Systems, a rival to Nvidia, is kicking off its IPO roadshow with shares expected to be priced between $115 and $125. [Technology, Reuters]

item.title: 🇫🇮✈️ Finland Raises Concerns with Ukraine Over Drones Entering Finnish Airspace
item.description: Finland has formally raised concerns with Ukraine after drones were detected entering Finnish airspace, highlighting tensions in Nordic security coordination. [Europe, Kyiv Independent]

item.title: 🛢️💰 Oil Prices Climb as Iran Threatens US Forces
item.description: Oil prices rose amid escalating tensions as Iran issued threats against US forces in the region, adding to supply concerns. [Energy, Oil Price]

item.title: 🇮🇷⚛️ War with Iran Tests Trust in Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty
item.description: The conflict with Iran has created a fundamental crisis of trust in the nuclear non-proliferation regime, raising questions about the treatys future. [Middle East, Middle East Eye]

item.title: 🇱🇧💀 Hezbollah Pays Steep Price in Battle to Reverse Its Fortunes
item.description: More than 2,600 people have been killed since March 2, around a fifth of them women, children and medics, Lebanons health ministry has reported, as Hezbollah fights to regain momentum. [Middle East, Reuters]

item.title: 🚢🇮🇷 Trump Says US Will Help Ships Stranded in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Donald Trump announced the US would help ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz after a tanker was hit by projectiles, amid escalating tensions with Iran. [US-Iran War, Reuters]

item.title: ⚔️🇺🇸 CBS News Live Updates: Iran War - Trump, Strait of Hormuz, Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire
item.description: CBS News provides ongoing live coverage of the Iran conflict, including Trumps statements on the Strait of Hormuz and developments in the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. [Middle East, CBS News]

item.title: 🌍📺 BBC News Live Coverage: Iran Conflict Updates
item.description: BBC News provides continuous live updates on the Iran conflict and regional developments. [Middle East, BBC]

item.title: 🇩🇪🛡️ NATO Defense Spending Rose Almost 20% in 2025
item.description: NATO members defense spending increased by nearly 20% in 2025, reflecting growing security concerns and pressure from the US administration. [Europe, AP News]

item.title: 🇪🇺⚔️ European NATO Defense Spending Rose Almost 20% in 2025
item.description: European NATO members significantly increased defense budgets in 2025, driven by Russian threats and US pressure for burden sharing. [Europe, Deutsche Welle]

item.title: 🇹🇼🌍 Taiwan Has Become Essential for Worlds Future, Says Deputy Foreign Minister
item.description: Taiwans deputy foreign minister emphasized the islands critical role in global supply chains and geopolitics in an interview with Le Monde. [Asia-Pacific, Le Monde]

item.title: 🌏📉 Global Fragmentation Is Rewiring Asias Economic Future
item.description: The fracturing of global trade relationships is fundamentally reshaping Asias economic trajectory and supply chain dynamics. [Asia-Pacific, Asia Times]

item.title: ☢️🚨 IAEA Says Drone Targeted Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Power Plant
item.description: The International Atomic Energy Agency reported that a drone targeted the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plants external radiation monitoring systems, raising safety concerns. [Ukraine-Russia War, Reuters]

item.title: 🇺🇸🇹🇼 US Calls Taiwan a Trusted, Capable Partner
item.description: The US praised Taiwan as a trusted partner and highlighted its diplomatic relationships, in comments likely to draw criticism from Beijing. [US-China, Reuters]

item.title: 🇮🇷⚖️ Nobel Laureate Mohammadi Remains in Critical Condition in Iran
item.description: Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi remains in critical condition in Iranian custody, according to a foundation monitoring her situation. [Middle East, Reuters]

item.title: 🇯🇵🇦🇺 Japan and Australia Strengthen Cooperation with Energy Agreements
item.description: Japan and Australia signed new cooperation agreements focused on energy security, deepening their strategic partnership amid regional uncertainty. [Asia-Pacific, AP News]

item.title: 🇨🇳🤖 AI Helped Shenzhen Judges Handle Cases 50% Faster
item.description: Artificial intelligence tools helped judges in Shenzhen process cases 50% faster, offering a glimpse into Chinas judicial automation future. [Technology, South China Morning Post]

item.title: 🇬🇧💰 UK Set to Enter Talks on Joining EU €105.9 Billion Ukraine Loan
item.description: The UK is preparing to enter discussions about participating in the European Unions 105.9 billion euro loan package for Ukraine, marking a shift in post-Brexit financial cooperation. [Europe, Reuters]

item.title: 📺 BBC News Coverage: Global Developments
item.description: BBC News coverage of ongoing global developments. [Global, BBC]

item.title: 📺 BBC News Coverage: Regional Updates
item.description: BBC News regional coverage and updates. [Global, BBC]

item.title: 📺 BBC News Coverage: International Affairs
item.description: BBC News coverage of international affairs and developments. [Global, BBC]
